summary: Plan-only classification for five open PRs. No merge candidates are recommended because none has a complete merge preflight with a clean Codex /review. Two PRs need scoped human decisions: #93922 has no hydrated code delta despite claiming a fix, and #93939 is blocked on failed real-behavior proof. #93846 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked that exact PR as security-sensitive.

actions.reason: Promising linked fix, but merge is blocked by missing Codex /review proof and unreviewed unrelated churn on an uneditable contributor branch.
The PR body and hydrated diff conflict. Maintainer judgment is needed on whether to request the actual patch from the author, split a fix job for #92519, or close later under a policy that allows it.
The scope is small, but the job explicitly requires human handling for missing proof; the proof gate failed, so merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout is blocked.
Focused likely fix, but not merge-ready in this plan because required Codex /review and merge-preflight evidence are missing.
Security-sensitive items are out of ProjectClownfish remediation scope and must be routed centrally as exact issue/PR refs.

needs_human: #93922: PR claims a session recovery fix for #92519 but the hydrated diff has zero changed files and only retry-test commits.
#93939: Tailscale serve reset PR has failed Real behavior proof and a triage: needs-real-behavior-proof label, so proof must be resolved before merge consideration.
